rationale: Falsifiability lens, whole branch @21374bb8. Walked AC1-AC13: every named test exists (grep -q confirmed for all 16 new tests + extended TestApproveImplCallOrder anchor) and passes with its exact -run (approve/executor/complete/lifecycle all green individually and as suites). RED-on-revert genuinely holds: at the four discriminator SHAs (eb6a2ed1, 77d8a1a9, 18cc59d9, bcb255eb) each named test/anchor has ZERO code hits (git grep -c = none). Not tautologies: AC13 WorktreeEnum forces scan->no-orphans yet refuses on a non-ancestor enumerated worktree with FinalizeEpic uncalled, fails closed on list-error, no false positives (ancestor + different-spec); AC11 MergeBase(:294) precedes the gate(:369) which precedes epic-close/phase-write(:387,:411)/FinalizeEpic(:443); AC10 uses production validate.GlobMatch, asserts exactly-one=workflow (claim lands only in workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9). AC8 diff-grep removed=1/after=0, comment corrected. AC9: ADR 'impl approve'=5, 'closed without'=2 in all three surfaces, ADR dated 2026-07-11. Negative pins clean: no BranchExistsE, no show-ref in Go, gitutil byte-unchanged. CI-ready: build/gofmt/vet/golangci-lint(0 issues)/mindspec validate all pass. Git left clean. No non-discriminating proof found.
